title: No.IXAPI
description: A magical mod that offers a variety of magical items.
body: Have you ever felt the need for something akin to a 'servant'? Or perhaps you have played the 'goety' mod but found the available servants insufficient? This mod will provide a plethora of servants! **Additionally, this mod is a rework of the noixmod, incorporating a significant portion of its content.Versions after 1.3.902 require IXApi as a prerequisite.**
